caption: A man is seated in a studio setting, wearing a white baseball cap, headphones, and a black sweatshirt with "BOSSES TALK" printed in gold letters on the chest. He sits behind a dark table equipped with a professional microphone on a boom arm and a small black speaker. Behind him is a white backdrop featuring a repeated gold star logo with the text "UNION HUSTLE" and a blue banner at the top that reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". In the initial frames, the man is seen in profile, looking toward someone off-screen. As the sequence progresses, he begins to speak and gestures with his right hand, opening his palm and extending his arm outward to emphasize a point. To his right, a small black object with red text that reads "TALK OUT" is visible on the table.
